style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a medieval biblical codex open on a heavy wooden lectern, thick sepia-gold parchment pages, gothic calligraphy in crimson ink
subject.focal_point: an illuminated capital letter worked in gold leaf at the start of Apocalypse 6
subject.secondary: A single beeswax candle burns beside the book casting warm lateral light; nothing modern visible

composition.rule: rule of thirds on illuminated letter
composition.foreground: parchment and candlelight in saturated sepia-gold-crimson
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white ruined library shelves in background

style.post_processing: halation, warm highlights, crushed blacks, Caravaggio grading

symbolism.primary: the prophetic word preserved across two millennia

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
